name: Jellyfin
compose:
name: slashnode-jellyfin
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/jellyfin:10.11.11
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8096:8096
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-jellyfin_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-jellyfin_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (jellyfin). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://jellyfin.org/.
